name: gigflow-dashboard-monorepo
description: GigFlow Smart Leads Dashboard - Clean MERN Monorepo Layout

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm start --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
